summary: Per-message mail alerts, reliable calendar sync, and cleaner app icon.

introduced: Background mail and calendar pollers keep badges and alerts working outside Inbox and Calendar tabs
changed: Email notifications now arrive one-by-one with sender, account, and subject instead of a bundled unread summary
Calendar upcoming list and meeting alerts sync from web view and iCal with improved date and timezone parsing
App and website icons updated with white shadow halo removed
fixed: Dock badge and mail notifications now update reliably for web Gmail accounts
Calendar no longer shows empty upcoming list when meetings are visible in the week view
